source_artifacts: Sprint 2: BMC-0A two-plane-wave superposition control artifact
Sprint 3: BMC-0A numerical robustness/convergence audit artifact
Sprint 6.1: BMC-0A Friedmann-spec data-integrity/gate repair artifact

null_models.name: Constant Phase Control Null Model
null_models.purpose: Verify if a phase-invariant state produces a fake residual match.
null_models.reason: Required to isolate phase-independent wave behavior from cosmological evolution.

null_models.name: Randomized Phase Control Null Model
null_models.purpose: Establish baseline residual behavior for random phase fluctuations.
null_models.reason: Required to calibrate the background noise of random phase configurations.

null_models.name: Matched Amplitude Randomized Phase Null Model
null_models.purpose: Disentangle the amplitude contribution from phase alignment.
null_models.reason: Required to ensure amplitude envelope does not mimic cosmic expansion on its own.

null_models.name: Classical FRW Reference Null Model
null_models.purpose: Verify convergence to classical limit reference curves.
null_models.reason: Required to check classical limit convergence behavior under noise.

null_models.name: Same Branch Segmentation under Null Wavefunctions
null_models.purpose: Confirm if non-monotonic segmentation is robust under null perturbations.
null_models.reason: Required to confirm turning points are physical and not segmenting on noise.

null_models.name: Node Neighborhood Stress Null Model
null_models.purpose: Check robustness of exclusions near wavefunction nodes.
null_models.reason: Required to stress-test exclusionary boundary logic near node obstructions.

null_models.name: Clock Choice Alternative Branch Null Model
null_models.purpose: Analyze alternative clock candidates (e.g. alpha clock) on segmented branches.
null_models.reason: Required to rule out bias coming from using one relational clock over another.

input_requirements.source_artifact: Sprint 2: BMC-0A two-plane-wave superposition control artifact
input_requirements.reason: Base quantum trajectory data is fully generated and validated.

input_requirements.source_artifact: Sprint 3: BMC-0A numerical robustness/convergence audit artifact
input_requirements.reason: Convergence metrics are available for classical comparisons.
Local branch and turning point maps are recorded.
Candidate target maps and specifications are defined.

metric_contracts.description: Evaluation of segment branch count consistency across perturbations
metric_contracts.reason: Enforces stable segmentation before residual comparison.

metric_contracts.description: Sensitivity of turning points to wavefunction phase shifts
metric_contracts.reason: Ensures clock turning points are physical.

metric_contracts.description: Proportion of branches that preserve a single-valued relation to target clock
metric_contracts.reason: Screens out random phase fluctuations that violate single-valuedness.

metric_contracts.description: Proportion of branch points where numerical derivative stencil is stable
metric_contracts.reason: Validates derivative stencils for residual formulas.

metric_contracts.description: Frequency of points entering excluded node-proximity zones
metric_contracts.reason: Ensures node proximity logic remains active.

metric_contracts.description: Verification of minimum amplitude distribution against noise limits
metric_contracts.reason: Prevents near-node mathematical blowups in metrics.

metric_contracts.description: Distribution of qpotential magnitudes away from nodes
metric_contracts.reason: Tracks potential barriers relative to null models.

metric_contracts.description: Availability rate of required variable mappings
metric_contracts.reason: Confirms alternative clocks are ready for testing.

future_comparison_contracts.reason: Future comparison contract planned; no comparisons computed in Sprint 7.
